_meta.note: Authoritative (174,87) LDPC codeword from the UNMODIFIED reference encoder. 'msgbits' is a fixed deterministic 87-bit message (bit i(1-origin) = (i*37+5)>>1 & 1); 'codeword' is encode174(msgbits) — [parity|message] permuted by colorder. Gates the Rust encode174 bit-exact; parity_errors under the transcribed Nm tables must be 0. CRC-12 is validated separately (cross-decode gate).
